title: Revelation of Jesus; seven churches
summary_text: God gave Jesus to show servants things which must soon happen—angel signified to John—blessed reads hears keeps words prophecy—John Patmos Lord’s day—voice like trumpet—see seven golden lampstands—Son of Man among stars seven churches—was dead alive forever—keys death Hades.
key_points: The Revelation of Jesus Christ, which God gave him to show to his servants the things which must happen soon.
Blessed is he who reads and those who hear the words of the prophecy.
I was in the Spirit on the Lord’s day, and I heard behind me a loud voice.
I saw seven golden lampstands.
He had seven stars in his right hand.
I was dead, and behold, I am alive forever more. I have the keys of Death and of Hades.
evidence_phrases: The Revelation of Jesus Christ
Blessed is he who reads
on the Lord’s day
seven golden lampstands
seven stars
I was dead, and behold, I am alive forever more
the keys of Death and of Hades

title: Letters to Ephesus through Thyatira
summary_text: To Ephesus—left first love repent. Smyrna—tribulation ten days faithful crown life. Pergamum—Satan’s throne Balaam teaching Nicolaitans repent. Thyatira—Jezebel prophetess taught seduce—children killed with death—hold fast till come.
key_points: I have this against you, that you left your first love.
Be faithful to death, and I will give you the crown of life.
So you also have some who hold to the teaching of the Nicolaitans.
I gave her time to repent, but she refuses to repent of her sexual immorality.
evidence_phrases: you left your first love
Be faithful to death
the teaching of the Nicolaitans
where Satan’s throne is
Jezebel … teaches and seduces
I will kill her children with death

title: Sardis Philadelphia Laodicea
summary_text: Sardis—name lives dead wake strengthen. Philadelphia—key David open shut—keep word patience—synagogue Satan. Laodicea—lukewarm spit—rich wretched naked—gold white eye salve—stand door knock—sit throne.
themes: Behold I stand at the door
key_points: I know your works, that you have a name that you are alive, and you are dead.
Behold, I have set before you an open door, which no one can shut.
Behold, I give some of the synagogue of Satan.
Because you are lukewarm, and neither hot nor cold, I will vomit you out of my mouth.
Behold, I stand at the door and knock.
evidence_phrases: you have a name … and you are dead
an open door, which no one can shut
synagogue of Satan
you are lukewarm
you are wretched, miserable, poor, blind, and naked
Behold, I stand at the door and knock

title: Throne in heaven; twenty-four elders
summary_text: Door open in heaven—come up here—throne one seated jasper rainbow emerald—twenty-four thrones elders white crowns worship—Holy Holy Holy Lord God Almighty—worthy glory honor power created all.
key_points: After these things I looked and behold, a door standing open in heaven.
There was a throne set in heaven, and one sitting on the throne.
Around the throne were twenty-four thrones.
Holy, holy, holy is the Lord God, the Almighty.
You are worthy, our Lord and God, to receive the glory, the honor, and the power, for you created all things.
evidence_phrases: a door standing open in heaven
a throne set in heaven
twenty-four thrones
Holy, holy, holy
You are worthy … for you created all things

title: Lamb worthy; new song
summary_text: Scroll sealed seven seals—strong angel who worthy—no one heaven earth—John weeps—Lion tribe Judah Root David overcome—Lamb slain seven horns eyes seven Spirits—took scroll—new song redeemed every tribe—myriads angels Worthy is Lamb.
key_points: I saw in the right hand of him who sat on the throne a book written inside and outside, sealed shut with seven seals.
Behold, the Lion who is of the tribe of Judah.
I saw a Lamb standing, as though it had been slain.
They sang a new song, saying, ‘You are worthy to take the book.’
Worthy is the Lamb who has been killed to receive the power, wealth, wisdom, strength, honor, glory, and blessing.
evidence_phrases: sealed shut with seven seals
the Lion who is of the tribe of Judah
a Lamb standing, as though it had been slain
You are worthy to take the book
Worthy is the Lamb

title: Six seals opened
summary_text: White horse conqueror; red peace taken; black scales famine; pale horse Death Hades fourth; souls under altar how long—white robes wait; great earthquake sun black moon blood stars fall heaven scroll sky rolled every mountain island moved.
key_points: I saw when the Lamb opened one of the seals.
A white horse, and he who sat on it had a bow.
Power was given to them over the fourth of the earth, to kill.
How long, Master, the holy and true, until you judge and avenge our blood?
There was a great earthquake. The sun became black as sackcloth.
evidence_phrases: when the Lamb opened one of the seals
A white horse
A pale horse
How long, Master
There was a great earthquake
the sky was removed like a scroll

title: Sealed 144000; great multitude
summary_text: Four winds held—seal servants God 144000 all tribes—great multitude white robes palm branches before throne—Salvation God throne Lamb—elders who these—came great tribulation washed robes Lamb—shepherd leads fountains—no hunger sun heat Lamb midst throne
key_points: Don’t harm the earth, neither the sea, nor the trees, until we have sealed the bondservants of our God on their foreheads!
I heard the number of those who were sealed, one hundred forty-four thousand.
Behold, a great multitude, which no man could number.
These are those who came out of the great tribulation.
He will shepherd them, and will guide them to springs of living waters.
evidence_phrases: sealed the bondservants
one hundred forty-four thousand
a great multitude
came out of the great tribulation
washed their robes
springs of living waters
God will wipe away every tear

title: Seventh seal; seven trumpets
summary_text: Silence heaven half hour—seven angels trumpets—golden censer prayers altar cast earth thunder voices lightning earthquakes—first trumpet hail fire blood third trees; second third sea creatures ships; third star Wormwood waters bitter; fourth third sun moon stars darkened.
key_points: When he opened the seventh seal, there was silence in heaven for about half an hour.
Another angel came and stood over the altar, having a golden censer.
There were thunders, sounds, lightnings, and an earthquake.
The first sounded, and there followed hail and fire.
A third of the sea became blood.
evidence_phrases: silence in heaven for about half an hour
golden censer
There were thunders
hail and fire
A third of the sea became blood
Wormwood

title: Locusts and horsemen
summary_text: Fifth star fallen key abyss—locusts like scorpions torment five months not kill—Abaddon king sixth four angels Euphrates third mankind killed fire smoke brimstone horses tails heads.
key_points: He opened the pit of the abyss, and smoke went up out of the pit.
In those days men will seek death, and will in no way find it.
They have over them as king the angel of the abyss. His name in Hebrew is ‘Abaddon.’
The four angels were freed who had been prepared for that hour and day and month and year.
By these three plagues were the third part of mankind killed.
evidence_phrases: opened the pit of the abyss
Abaddon
the four angels were freed
the third part of mankind killed
fire, smoke, and brimstone

title: Mighty angel and little scroll
summary_text: Another mighty angel rainbow cloud seven thunders sealed—swore no delay mystery finished—John eat scroll sweet bitter prophesy peoples nations tongues kings.
key_points: I saw a mighty angel coming down out of heaven, clothed with a cloud.
He swore by him who lives forever and ever, who created heaven and the things that are in it, that there will no longer be delay.
Take the book, and eat it up. It will make your stomach bitter, but in your mouth it will be as sweet as honey.
evidence_phrases: a mighty angel … clothed with a cloud
seven thunders
there will no longer be delay
It will make your stomach bitter
as sweet as honey

title: Two witnesses; seventh trumpet
summary_text: Measure temple altar exclude court gentiles trample holy city forty-two months two witnesses olive lampstands fire devour enemies beast abyss kill bodies three days half breath life ascended earthquake seventh trumpet voices kingdom world Christ reigns.
key_points: I will give power to my two witnesses, and they will prophesy one thousand two hundred sixty days.
The beast that ascends out of the abyss will make war with them, and overcome them, and kill them.
After the three and a half days, the breath of life from God entered into them.
The seventh angel sounded, and there followed loud voices in heaven, saying, ‘The kingdom of the world has become the Kingdom of our Lord, and of his Christ. He will reign forever and ever!’
evidence_phrases: my two witnesses
the beast that ascends out of the abyss
the breath of life from God entered into them
The kingdom of the world has become the Kingdom of our Lord

title: Woman, child, dragon
summary_text: Great sign woman sun moon twelve stars crown pain birth male child caught God throne—dragon third stars tail—child snatched woman wilderness—Michael war dragon cast earth accuser brethren overcome blood Lamb word.
key_points: A great sign was seen in heaven: a woman clothed with the sun.
She gave birth to a son, a male child, who is to rule all the nations with a rod of iron.
The great dragon was thrown down, the old serpent, he who is called the devil and Satan.
They overcame him because of the Lamb’s blood, and because of the word of their testimony.
evidence_phrases: a woman clothed with the sun
a male child, who is to rule all the nations
The great dragon was thrown down
They overcame him because of the Lamb’s blood

title: Two beasts
summary_text: Beast sea ten horns seven heads blasphemous names dragon power forty-two months wounded sword lived—worship dragon beast—another beast land two horns fire heaven image beast mark forehead hand 666.
key_points: I saw a beast coming up out of the sea, having ten horns and seven heads.
One of his heads looked like it had been killed fatally, and his fatal wound was healed.
All the earth wondered after the beast.
He makes the earth and those who dwell in it to worship the first beast.
that no one would be able to buy or sell, unless he has that mark, the name of the beast or the number of his name.
evidence_phrases: a beast coming up out of the sea
his fatal wound was healed
worship the first beast
the image of the beast
the mark … the number of his name
the number of the beast is six hundred sixty-six

title: Lamb and 144000; harvest
summary_text: Lamb Mount Zion 144000 Father’s name forehead new song harp—angels eternal gospel fall Babylon hour judgment—winepress blood city horses to bridles.
key_points: I looked, and behold, the Lamb standing on Mount Zion, and with him a number, one hundred forty-four thousand.
I saw an angel flying in mid heaven, having an eternal Good News to proclaim.
Fallen, fallen is Babylon the great.
The winepress was trodden outside of the city, and blood came out of the winepress.
evidence_phrases: the Lamb standing on Mount Zion
an eternal Good News to proclaim
Fallen, fallen is Babylon the great
If anyone worships the beast
The winepress was trodden
blood came out of the winepress

title: Seven angels; sea of glass
summary_text: Great marvelous signs seven angels last plagues—sea glass mingled fire victors beast image number harp song Moses Lamb great wonderful works nations worship—temple opened seven angels golden bowls smoke glory power no enter till plagues done.
key_points: I saw another great and marvelous sign in the sky: seven angels having the seven last plagues.
I saw something like a sea of glass mixed with fire.
They sang the song of Moses, the servant of God, and the song of the Lamb.
The temple was filled with smoke from the glory of God, and from his power. No one was able to enter into the temple until the seven plagues of the seven angels would be finished.
evidence_phrases: seven last plagues
a sea of glass mixed with fire
the song of Moses … and the song of the Lamb
the temple was filled with smoke

title: Seven bowls of wrath
summary_text: First bowl sores mark worshipers; second sea blood; third rivers blood justified; fourth sun scorch; fifth beast kingdom darkness; sixth Euphrates kings world Armageddon; seventh earthquake cities fell hailstones talent men blasphemed.
key_points: Go and pour out the seven bowls of the wrath of God on the earth.
The second poured out his bowl into the sea, and it became blood.
They are worthy, for they poured out the blood of the saints.
They gathered them together to the place which is called in Hebrew, ‘Armageddon.’
Every island fled away, and the mountains were not found.
evidence_phrases: pour out the seven bowls
it became blood
Armageddon
Every island fled away
great hailstones, about the weight of a talent

title: Babylon the harlot
summary_text: Angel carried wilderness woman scarlet beast seven heads ten horns drunk saints blood—mystery seven heads seven mountains kings ten horns hate harlot make desolate Lamb overcomes called chosen faithful.
key_points: Come, I will show you the judgment of the great prostitute who sits on many waters.
The woman was clothed in purple and scarlet, and decked with gold.
The seven heads are seven mountains, on which the woman sits.
These will war against the Lamb, and the Lamb will overcome them.
evidence_phrases: the great prostitute
sits on many waters
The seven heads are seven mountains
These will war against the Lamb
Mystery: ‘Babylon the great’

title: Fall of Babylon lamented
summary_text: Angel earth glory her—double plagues in cup—come out people—kings merchants captains lament smoke rise forever strong angel stone mill sea Babylon.
key_points: Fallen, fallen is Babylon the great, and she has become a habitation of demons.
Come out of her, my people, that you have no participation in her sins.
The kings of the earth who committed sexual immorality and lived wantonly with her will weep.
A mighty angel took up a stone like a great millstone and cast it into the sea, saying, ‘Thus with violence will Babylon, the great city, be thrown down.’
evidence_phrases: Fallen, fallen is Babylon the great
Come out of her, my people
The kings of the earth … will weep
Rejoice over her, you heavens
Babylon, the great city, be thrown down

title: Hallelujah; marriage supper; beast defeated
summary_text: Great multitude heaven Hallelujah smoke ascends forever fine linen bride Lamb marriage supper blessed—white horse Faithful True armies heaven sword mouth beast false prophet lake fire birds supper flesh kings.
key_points: Hallelujah! For the Lord our God, the Almighty, reigns.
Blessed are those who are invited to the marriage supper of the Lamb.
His name is called The Word of God.
The armies which are in heaven followed him on white horses.
The beast was taken, and with him the false prophet who worked the signs in his sight.
evidence_phrases: Hallelujah! For the Lord our God … reigns
the marriage supper of the Lamb
His name is called The Word of God
King of kings, and Lord of lords
The beast was taken
cast alive into the lake of fire

title: Thousand years; great white throne
summary_text: Angel chain dragon abyss thousand years thrones souls beheaded reigned Christ first resurrection second death no power Gog Magog fire devoured great white throne books opened sea gave dead death Hades lake fire second death.
key_points: He seized the dragon, the old serpent, which is the devil and Satan, and bound him for a thousand years.
They lived and reigned with Christ for a thousand years.
This is the first resurrection.
They went up over the width of the earth, and surrounded the camp of the saints.
I saw a great white throne, and him who sat on it.
Death and Hades were thrown into the lake of fire. This is the second death.
evidence_phrases: bound him for a thousand years
reigned with Christ for a thousand years
This is the first resurrection
the camp of the saints
a great white throne
Death and Hades were thrown into the lake of fire
This is the second death

title: New heaven and earth; New Jerusalem
summary_text: First heaven earth passed sea no more holy city new Jerusalem bride adorned God tabernacle peoples no tear death pain former passed throne words true finished Alpha Omega fountain life gates pearls street gold no temple Lamb glory nations kings tree leaves healing.
key_points: I saw a new heaven and a new earth: for the first heaven and the first earth have passed away.
He will dwell with them. They will be his peoples, and God himself will be with them as their God.
Behold, God’s dwelling is with people, and he will dwell with them.
I saw the holy city, New Jerusalem, coming down out of heaven from God.
The river of the water of life, clear as crystal, proceeding out of the throne of God and of the Lamb.
There will be no curse any more.
evidence_phrases: a new heaven and a new earth
He will dwell with them
New Jerusalem
the river of the water of life
the throne of God and of the Lamb
There will be no curse any more

title: River of life; invitation; closing words
summary_text: River water life tree leaves nations no curse throne Lamb servants see face name foreheads no night lamp God reign forever—sealed book soon—wash robes tree life outside dogs sorcerers—testimony churches come quickly amen
key_points: The Spirit and the bride say, ‘Come!’ He who hears, let him say, ‘Come!’
Let him who is thirsty come. Let him who desires take the water of life freely.
They will see his face, and his name will be on their foreheads.
He said to me, ‘Don’t seal up the words of the prophecy of this book, for the time is at hand.’
He who testifies these things says, ‘Yes, I come quickly.’ Amen! Come, Lord Jesus.
evidence_phrases: the river of the water of life
Let him who is thirsty come
They will see his face
Don’t seal up the words
Yes, I come quickly
Come, Lord Jesus
The grace of the Lord Jesus Christ be with all the saints
